title: wedelia aggregata
intro: Wedelia aggregata, also known as Mexican gold, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. The health benefits of Wedelia aggregata include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders such as diarrhea and constipation. Wedelia aggregata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
